name: triage-board-block
title: Triage / ED Board
description: A full-width ED wallboard — the acuity-sorted roster leading, a risk-scores panel for the selected patient, and a vitals overview. No sidebar (shared display). DashboardShell + DashboardGrid.

props.name: roster
props.description: Waiting patients; sorts by acuity then wait.

props.name: risk
props.description: Risk scores for the selected patient.

clinicalNotes: Designed for a shared wall display, so it runs full-bleed (no sidebar) and leans on the roster's acuity sort + wait-target chips to be legible at distance — the two things that drive ED flow. Keep the risk and vitals panels tied to the currently-selected/most-critical patient. Because it may be always-on, honor prefers-reduced-motion (the underlying components already gate pulses behind motion-safe) and avoid color-only signals — every acuity and status carries a text label.
notes: Layer-M3 block (B-4). Client component. Composes 3 M2 panels; strong differentiator vs generic kits.
